query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "grepseek: training search agents for direct corpus interaction" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring the dependent variable of "instruction-following capability" in retrieval models, which is the core mechanism of the user's "GrepSeek" search agents, and criterion (f) by providing the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster (instruction-following IR, instruction-aware embeddings) for the user's query about training search agents for direct corpus interaction.
